evals.prompt:
Execute backtest on this Qlib formula:

formula: "-(Mean($close,1)/Mean($close,5)-1) * Rank(Std($close,5))"
factor_id: "REV-VOL"
backtest_config:
  start_date: "2024-01-01"
  end_date: "2025-12-31"
  universe: "jp_stocks_300"
  rebalance_frequency: "daily"

Compute Sharpe ratio, IC, and max drawdown. Return performance metrics in JSON format per SKILL.md.
evals.expected_output: JSON object with factor_id, formula, performance (sharpe, ic, max_drawdown), and metadata. Sharpe should be >1.5 for this formula.
